import http.client

        conn.request('GET', path, headers=headers)
        resp = conn.getresponse()
        body = resp.read(100)
        conn.close()
        if resp.status != 404:
            print('Depth', depth, 'target', target, 'status', resp.status)
            print(body.decode(errors='ignore'))
